title: ctenitis manipurensis
intro: Ctenitis manipurensis, also known as the Manipuri ctenitis, is a plant species in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). It is a perennial fern native to the Manipur region of India, and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote immune system function. Herbal preparations of Ctenitis manipurensis include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
